title: Nabarangpur Forest Division Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
post_name: Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert
short_info: Nabarangpur Forest Division Recruitment 2026: Nabarangpur Forest Division has officially released the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under this contractual recruitment drive. Candidates who possess a Master’s Degree in Geology, Environmental Science, Urban Planning, Geoinformatics, Computer Science, GIS, Remote Sensing, Natural Science, Earth Science, or allied subjects with at least 60% marks are eligible to attend the walk-in interview.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation of 5 years is applicable for SC/ST/SEBC candidates.

qualification.details: Master's Degree in Geology, Environmental Science, Urban Planning, Geoinformatics, Computer Science, GIS, Remote Sensing, Natural Science, Earth Science or allied subjects from a recognized university having at least 60% Marks.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert

selection_process: Interview based on previous field experience and performance

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to submit the CV via email for the Nabarangpur Forest Division recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your Curriculum Vitae (CV) via email for the Nabarangpur Forest Division Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert recruitment is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position at Nabarangpur Forest Division is scheduled to be held on 06 June 2026. Candidates are advised to be present on time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Geology, Environmental Science, Urban Planning, Geoinformatics, Computer Science, GIS, Remote Sensing, Natural Science, Earth Science, or allied subjects from a recognized university with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/SEBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert role will receive a salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month, along with 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Nabarangpur Forest Division recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for the Nabarangpur Forest Division recruitment for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert post. This applies to all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert post in the Nabarangpur Forest Division.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position?
faq.answer: The job for the Senior Research Fellow cum GIS Expert position is contractual in nature. This means the appointment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable). Also, bring recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview. Your previous field experience and performance during the interview will be considered.
